stages.format_contract: BGR888 conversion required for OpenCV processing
cv::Rect2d bounding box, cv::Mat BGR frame

issues_detected.description: ZeroCopyFrame format contract violation: CameraWrapper outputs RAW10 but OrbDetector requires BGR888 for OpenCV processing. No format conversion present in data path.

evidence.ZeroCopyFrame_structure: plane_data[4] pointers to RAW10 DMA buffer

issues_detected.impact: Garbled image processing, incorrect feature detection, potential crash when accessing invalid memory
issues_detected.determinism: Always occurs when camera produces RAW10 frames

issues_detected.description: Ring buffer consumer does not update SafetyMonitor after frame processing. Safety monitor tracks vision_frame_count but track_compute does not call update_actuation_frame().

evidence.actual_call: None - track_compute processes frames without notifying safety monitor
evidence.safety_requirement: AM7-L2-ACT-003: Actuation output deadline monitoring (2ms max latency)

issues_detected.impact: Safety monitor cannot detect actuation pipeline stalls, false negative on system health

issues_detected.description: Actuation thread does not read from track_compute output. No data structure connects tracking solution to ballistic solver or gimbal commands.

evidence.actual_dataflow: actuation_output has no consumer of track_compute results
evidence.missing_component: Inter-thread queue for TrackSolution → FireControlSolution pipeline

issues_detected.impact: Gimbal commands computed from stale or no tracking data, system cannot track moving targets
issues_detected.determinism: Always occurs - data path not implemented

issues_detected.description: Ring buffer capacity of 4 frames provides only 33ms buffer at 120Hz. With producer at 120Hz and consumer potentially slower due to OrbDetector processing (~10-20ms), buffer may experience backpressure.

evidence.required_capacity: Minimum 6 frames for WCET variance absorption

issues_detected.impact: Frame drops under high computational load, vision pipeline stalls
issues_detected.determinism: Occurs when OrbDetector processing exceeds 2 frame periods

issues_detected.description: TrackSolution::psr field type mismatch: KcfTracker uses float psr but state_machine.hpp defines psr as float with threshold 0.035. PSR (Peak-to-Sidelobe Ratio) typically ranges 1-100, not 0-1.

evidence.tracker_definition: float psr (KcfTracker::update returns psr=1.0f for valid tracks)

issues_detected.impact: Track validity checks may always fail or always pass depending on actual PSR values

issues_detected.description: TelemetryWriter uses std::mutex for queue protection but does not use lock-free primitives. Under high telemetry load, mutex contention may cause priority inversion with real-time threads.

evidence.priority_inversion_risk: High-priority thread may block on mutex held by low-priority telemetry thread

issues_detected.impact: Deadline misses in real-time threads due to priority inversion
issues_detected.determinism: Occurs under high telemetry load with concurrent log_frame() calls

issues_detected.description: I2C write operations lack timeout handling and retry logic. I2C bus hangs (common with servo controllers) will block indefinitely.

evidence.error_handling: Returns false but no recovery mechanism

issues_detected.impact: Actuation thread may block indefinitely on I2C bus hang, causing deadline misses and safety faults
issues_detected.determinism: Occurs when I2C bus experiences transient faults

issues_detected.description: Thread join timeout logic is incorrect. join_with_timeout uses a polling loop but does not actually implement timeout - it detaches threads that don't terminate, risking resource leaks.

evidence.expected_behavior: Join thread with timeout, force-terminate if unresponsive
evidence.actual_behavior: Detaches thread after timeout (thread continues running with dangling references)
evidence.risk: Dangling references to safety_monitor, camera, frame_buffer after detach

issues_detected.impact: Undefined behavior if detached threads access destroyed objects during shutdown
issues_detected.determinism: Occurs when threads fail to terminate within 2 seconds

issues_detected.description: CsvLogEntry timestamp fields use epoch_ms but timing.hpp uses CLOCK_MONOTONIC_RAW nanoseconds. Conversion loses monotonic precision and introduces epoch dependency.
issues_detected.impact: Telemetry correlation with internal timestamps requires epoch conversion, potential drift if system clock adjusted

issues_detected.description: ARMED state transition requires operator_authorization flag but no integration point exists to set it. has_operator_authorization() always returns false unless explicitly set.

evidence.authorization_source: No caller of set_operator_authorization() in main.cpp
evidence.state_machine_requirement: AM7-L3-MODE-010: Operator authorization for ARMED state

issues_detected.impact: System cannot transition to ARMED state, fire control permanently inhibited
issues_detected.determinism: Always occurs - authorization signal not wired

issues_detected.description: ZeroCopyFrame::error field is fixed-size char[128] but snprintf calls in camera_wrapper.cpp may overflow if error messages exceed buffer. No bounds checking on error string copy.
issues_detected.impact: Potential buffer overflow if error message exceeds 127 characters (plus null terminator)

issues_detected.description: Telemetry queue max size is 1000 entries but no backpressure signal to producer. Oldest entries dropped silently when queue full.

evidence.entries_dropped_tracking: entries_dropped_ atomic counter exists but not monitored

issues_detected.impact: Silent telemetry data loss under high load, no indication of data loss to operators
issues_detected.determinism: Occurs when telemetry writer cannot keep up with log_frame() rate

libcamera_to_ring_buffer.synchronization: Lock-free SPSC (atomic head/tail with memory fences)

safety_monitor_integration.watchdog_kick: safety_monitor.kick_watchdog() - NOT CALLED from main loop
safety_monitor_integration.status: PARTIAL - Actuation monitoring and watchdog kick missing

lock_free_ring_buffer.evidence: Atomic head/tail with proper memory_order_acquire/release semantics, cache-line aligned to prevent false sharing

safety_monitor_atomics.evidence: All state variables use std::atomic with explicit memory ordering

telemetry_writer_mutex.evidence: std::mutex used in log_frame() called from real-time threads
telemetry_writer_mutex.recommendation: Use lock-free queue for real-time telemetry production

fusion_hat_i2c.evidence: I2C operations not protected by mutex, potential race if called from multiple threads
fusion_hat_i2c.recommendation: Add mutex protection or document single-threaded usage

recommendations.recommendation: Implement RAW10 → BGR888 format conversion in vision pipeline. Add CameraWrapper::wrap_as_mat() implementation that performs debayering before passing to OrbDetector.
Implement inter-thread data path: track_compute → LockFreeRingBuffer<TrackSolution> → actuation_output. Wire operator authorization signal to state machine.
Add safety_monitor.update_actuation_frame() call in actuation_output thread. Replace TelemetryWriter mutex with lock-free queue.
Fix PSR threshold: change kPsrFailThreshold from 0.035f to appropriate value (e.g., 5.0f) based on KCF tracker PSR output range.
Increase ring buffer capacity to 8 frames. Add I2C timeout/retry logic. Fix thread join timeout implementation. Add bounds checking to ZeroCopyFrame::error.
Use monotonic timestamps consistently in telemetry. Add backpressure notification when telemetry queue drops entries.
